/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++11 -O3 -Wall -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock_main.so -o ../lib/libgmock_main.so CMakeFiles/gmock_main.dir/src/gmock_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hldrz/IntelligentUAVChampionship/basic_dev/build/so3_quadrotor_simulator/gtest/lib ../lib/libgmock.so ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
